title: Cost-control operating policy
description: Add explicit local/CI/EC2 runtime split and no-loop rules.
notes: Prevents EC2 starts for work that can be prepared locally or in CI.

title: Local dev preflight helper
description: Check GPU memory local ComfyUI candidates model roots and selected-lane static validity without external contact.
notes: Local dev does not replace EC2 final proof; current local ComfyUI main.py is absent.

title: Deploy bundle helper
description: Package lane files run package registry metadata and safe runtime context while EC2 is off.
notes: Bundle output is gitignored under runtime_artifacts/deploy_bundles.

title: GitHub Actions preflight package
description: Run model registry coverage package build and deploy bundle upload on GitHub-hosted Windows runner.
notes: Uses checkout with lfs=false and artifact retention 7 days.

title: Skip LFS by default on EC2
description: Make Git LFS pull opt-in for EC2 helpers.
notes: Use -SkipGitLfsPull unless a lane explicitly needs repo LFS payloads.

title: Runtime TTL guardrails
description: Add max runtime minutes and SSM command timeout/cancel handling to EC2 helpers.
notes: Live proof still must stop EC2 and verify final state.

title: Queue current-lane transition
description: Move from completed low-risk proof lane to current RealVisXL runtime lane without hardcoding order-one gating.
notes: Prevents autonomous loops that keep trying to re-run the completed low-risk lane.
